rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Elec. Code §276.018, which criminalizes perjury in voter registration and election oath contexts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 276.018. PERJURY IN CONNECTION WITH CERTAIN ELECTION PROCEDURES.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election perjury, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
